title: May 2022 — spider-drive sighting on Fair Oaks Dr off Walnut Blvd
html:
TL;DR

  • Title-only May 2022 note: Yahir flagged a "spider-drive" sighting on Fair Oaks Dr off Walnut Blvd in Corvallis — a hyper-local geographic landmark or curiosity.
  • "Spider drive" is ambiguous — most likely a Fiat 124 Spider or Alfa Romeo Spider convertible Yahir saw and wanted to remember the location of, possibly for sale.
  • Adds Walnut Blvd to the Corvallis geography map — a major arterial Yahir is observably noting in 2022.
  • Sister to 2022 04 18 math 231 quiz's "start looking for iPad" — Yahir was in active acquire-a-thing mode that spring (FB Marketplace mindset).
  • A near-zero-content note that nonetheless geo-tags Yahir's Corvallis mental map for May 2022.

Why it matters

Title-only notes aren't worthless — they're notes as letter to self meant to jog future memory. The fact that Yahir bothered to write down a street intersection means the spider was something he wanted to act on later.

Two graph hooks:

  1. Geography. Walnut Blvd is the main north-south arterial on west Corvallis — useful for any future corvallis mental map canvas.
  2. Acquisition-impulse log. Spring 2022 has Yahir in active "what should I buy / sell next" mode (iPad, glasses, raingear products, this car) — coheres into a 2022 acquisition impulse thread.

Open questions

  • What kind of spider? (Most likely Fiat 124 Spider; could also be Alfa Romeo Spider.)
  • Did he ever follow up? (No trace.)
  • Was it for sale or just a sighting? (Note implies "remember this location" → likely for sale or owner-spotted.)

Wikilinks
